homepage.heroSubline: Custom-designed entertainment spaces built for Texas living. From cozy bungalows to modern homes, we transform rooms into cinematic escapes.
aboutText: Founded in 2011, Horizon Home Theater began with a passion for bringing the magic of cinema into Austin homes. Our founder, a former recording studio engineer, combined audio precision with smart home technology to create truly immersive experiences.

We approach every project as a unique artistic and technical challenge. Using only equipment that stands up to Texas heat and humidity, we design systems that perform flawlessly year-round while blending seamlessly with your home's architecture.
As active members of the Austin tech community, we're proud to support local music and film festivals. Our team volunteers annually for youth STEM programs at the Thinkery and Austin Public Library.

valueProps.title: Texas-Tested Gear
valueProps.description: We only install equipment rated for continuous operation in 100°F+ temperatures, with special attention to humidity control.

valueProps.title: Space-Optimized Designs
valueProps.description: From historic bungalows to modern open-concept homes, we create theater solutions that work with your existing architecture.

valueProps.title: Future-Ready Systems
valueProps.description: Every installation includes capacity for emerging formats like 12K and object-based audio, protecting your investment.

valueProps.title: Local Service Promise
valueProps.description: Our Austin-based technicians arrive in under 48 hours for service calls across the metro area.

homepage.ctaHeadline: Ready for Your Premier Home Theater?
homepage.ctaSubline: Schedule a free consultation to discuss your vision. Evening and weekend appointments available.

services.name: Custom Home Theater Design
services.shortDescription: Complete turnkey theater rooms tailored to your space and viewing preferences.
services.description:
Our signature service transforms basements, spare rooms, or dedicated spaces into premium entertainment environments. We begin with detailed room analysis, measuring for optimal speaker placement and screen positioning specific to your room's dimensions and construction materials common in Central Texas homes.

For historic Austin properties with plaster walls or mid-century modern homes with open layouts, we develop specialized acoustic treatments that preserve architectural integrity. Each design includes climate-controlled equipment cabinets to combat summer heat, using materials that prevent resonance from nearby thunderstorms.

From the initial concept to final calibration, we handle everything - structural modifications, specialized wiring for limestone foundations, and even custom millwork matching your home's trim details.
process: Step 1: In-home consultation with 3D modeling of your space
Step 2: Custom equipment package selection based on room size and usage
Step 3: Acoustic treatment design for Central Texas building materials
Step 4: Installation with precision calibration for your seating positions

faq.question: How do you handle the unique acoustics of Austin's limestone homes?
faq.answer: We use specialized low-frequency traps and angled diffusers that counteract the reflective properties of stone walls, with vibration-damping mounts that prevent rattle during intense action scenes.

faq.question: Can you work with my historic home's existing architecture?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We've designed theaters in 1920s bungalows and mid-century moderns, creating solutions that preserve original moldings while hiding modern technology in custom cabinetry.

faq.question: What provisions do you make for Texas weather?
faq.answer: All equipment racks include active cooling systems rated for continuous 100°F operation, with whole-home surge protection for our intense thunderstorms.

services.name: Outdoor Entertainment Systems
services.shortDescription: Weatherproof audio-visual solutions for Austin's outdoor living spaces.
services.description:
Central Texas' long outdoor living season demands durable, high-performance systems. We design outdoor entertainment setups that withstand both summer heat and occasional winter storms, using marine-grade speakers and sun-resistant displays.

For pools and patios, we implement specialized audio zoning that maintains clarity over splashing water and AC unit noise. Our concealed wiring methods protect against rodents common in Austin's greenbelts, with all connections rated for flood zone installation.

We coordinate with local landscapers to integrate speakers into existing hardscaping, creating invisible systems that disappear when not in use. Solutions range from simple background music setups to full outdoor theaters with retractable screens designed for Hill Country sunset viewing.
process: Step 1: Site evaluation including sun exposure and noise sources
Step 2: Equipment selection based on exposure levels
Step 3: Professional installation with flood-proof wiring
Step 4: Tuning for optimal performance at different times of day

faq.question: How do you prevent sun damage to outdoor TVs?
faq.answer: We only use commercial-grade displays with anti-glare coatings and active cooling, mounted in locations that receive afternoon shade with optional motorized sunshades.

faq.question: Can the system handle pool parties?
faq.answer: Our poolside audio solutions use directional speakers that focus sound where needed while minimizing neighbor disturbance, with volume limiters for compliance with Austin noise ordinances.

services.name: Whole-Home Audio
services.shortDescription: Seamless music distribution throughout your Austin home.
services.description:
Create perfect audio ambiance in every room with our invisible sound systems designed for Central Texas lifestyles. We specialize in solutions for Austin's varied architecture - from historic homes with plaster walls to modern open-concept designs.

For limestone construction common in Hill Country estates, we use specialized vibration-damping mounts. In newer subdivisions with shared walls, we implement sound containment measures that keep your music private. Every system includes robust WiFi backbones to handle multiple streaming sources simultaneously.

Control options range from intuitive keypads to full voice integration with existing smart home systems. We can even sync your audio with circadian lighting for natural wake-up routines or set up whole-house alerts for severe weather warnings.
process: Step 1: Architectural analysis and listening position mapping
Step 2: Equipment selection based on room usage
Step 3: Professional installation with minimal invasiveness
Step 4: Room-by-room tuning for balanced sound

faq.question: How disruptive is installation in an existing home?
faq.answer: We use innovative fishing techniques to route wires through finished spaces, with typical installations completed in 1-2 days with minimal wall repair needed.

faq.question: Can the system accommodate Austin musicians?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We offer high-resolution audio options with studio-grade DACs, perfect for local artists wanting pristine playback of their recordings.

services.name: Media Room Optimization
services.shortDescription: Enhanced performance for existing entertainment spaces.
services.description:
Transform your underperforming media space into a reference-quality viewing environment. We analyze and upgrade every component - from display calibration to acoustic treatments - specifically addressing Central Texas' environmental challenges.

For homes experiencing intermittent audio issues during humid months, we implement moisture-resistant connections. We recalibrate systems seasonally to account for Austin's dramatic humidity swings, ensuring consistent performance year-round.

Our optimization process includes thorough equipment health checks, replacing marginal components before they fail during critical viewing. For multi-use spaces common in Austin condos, we create custom presets that instantly transform living areas into theater-quality environments.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive system evaluation
Step 2: Identification of performance bottlenecks
Step 3: Targeted upgrades and acoustic treatments
Step 4: Precision calibration for current conditions

faq.question: Why does my system sound different in summer?
faq.answer: Austin's humidity changes dramatically affect sound propagation. We adjust crossover settings and equalization to compensate for these seasonal variations.

faq.question: Can you improve my existing setup without replacing everything?
faq.answer: Often yes. Strategic speaker repositioning, acoustic panels, and professional calibration can yield dramatic improvements with your current equipment.

services.name: Smart Home Integration
services.shortDescription: Unified control for entertainment and home systems.
services.description:
Create seamless interactions between your entertainment systems and other smart home features. We design control solutions that account for Austin's unique infrastructure challenges - from managing whole-home audio during rolling blackouts to integrating with local energy monitoring programs.

Our systems provide one-touch 'Texas modes' that automatically adjust lighting, shades, and climate control when temperatures exceed 100°F. For security-conscious homeowners, we implement discrete camera integration that doesn't compromise aesthetic appeal.

We specialize in preserving functionality during internet outages common in growing Austin suburbs, with robust local control options. Every installation includes thorough client training at our Austin showroom, with lifetime support from our local tech team.
process: Step 1: Comprehensive needs assessment
Step 2: System architecture design
Step 3: Equipment programming and testing
Step 4: Client training and documentation

faq.question: How do you handle Austin's frequent internet outages?
faq.answer: Our systems maintain critical functions locally, with battery-backed controllers that keep your lighting and security operational even during extended outages.

faq.question: Can I control everything from my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, with secure remote access that doesn't require complex port forwarding - crucial for Austin's high rate of attempted smart home breaches.

reviews.name: Mark T.
reviews.text: Horizon transformed our Tarrytown basement into an incredible Dolby Atmos theater. They custom-built acoustic panels to match our 1950s wood paneling and installed a cooling system that keeps everything running perfectly even during 105°F days. The attention to detail was remarkable - they even repositioned our seating to avoid a limestone wall resonance we didn't know existed.

reviews.name: Lisa C.
reviews.text: Our Barton Springs backyard is now the ultimate entertainment spot thanks to Horizon. The weatherproof speakers disappear into our landscaping but sound amazing. They designed special mounts that survived last year's hail storm with zero damage. The team understood exactly how to position everything to avoid neighbor complaints while still getting great sound by the pool.

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: Living in a historic Clarksville home, we were worried about installing modern tech. Horizon created an invisible whole-house system using our existing closets for equipment, with vintage-style controls that match our home's character. The sound is flawless in every room, and they tuned it to compensate for our thick plaster walls. Game changer for entertaining.

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Our Westlake media room never sounded right until Horizon's team analyzed it. They discovered our limestone foundation was causing bass issues and installed specialized damping. The new acoustic treatments make dialogue crystal clear without being obtrusive. Now our family actually uses the room instead of just watching TV in the bedroom.

reviews.name: David M.
reviews.text: Horizon unified all our disparate smart devices into one intuitive system. Their 'Texas mode' automatically closes our shades and prioritizes AC when it hits 100°F, which has noticeably lowered our energy bills. The best part? Everything still works during Austin's frequent internet outages thanks to their local control design.

reviews.name: Elena S.
reviews.text: As filmmakers, we had extremely high standards for our Hyde Park home theater. Horizon delivered beyond expectations. The color calibration is reference quality, and they custom-tuned the audio to match our mixing studio. Even during July heat waves, the equipment stays cool and quiet. Worth every penny for true cinephiles.

service-areas.title: Home Theater Service Areas | Austin Metro | Horizon
service-areas.description: Professional home theater installation serving Austin, Round Rock, Cedar Park, Georgetown, Pflugerville and surrounding communities.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Home Theater proudly serves Round Rock, TX, a thriving city with a population of around 240,000. Known for its family-friendly subdivisions built primarily in the 1990s and 2000s, Round Rock offers the perfect setting for homeowners looking to enhance their entertainment spaces. With scorching summers often exceeding 100°F, our premium home theater installations provide a cool escape for families to enjoy movies, sports, and gaming in comfort. Whether you're upgrading an existing media room or designing a new home theater, our expert team ensures seamless integration tailored to your home's layout.
serviceAreas.localContext: Round Rock features spacious suburban homes with modern layouts, ideal for custom home theater setups.

serviceAreas.content: Cedar Park, TX, with its population of approximately 82,000, is a rapidly growing suburban community that Horizon Home Theater is proud to serve. The city's expansion in the 2000s has brought an influx of modern homes perfect for state-of-the-art home theater installations. Summers here are intensely hot, often surpassing 100°F, making indoor entertainment a necessity. Our team specializes in creating immersive home theater experiences, whether you're looking for a high-end Dolby Atmos setup or a cozy media room for family movie nights.
serviceAreas.localContext: Cedar Park's newer suburban homes offer ample space for cutting-edge home theater designs.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Home Theater extends its services to Georgetown, TX, a charming city with a population of about 75,000. Known for its picturesque Victorian-style downtown and historic homes, Georgetown blends old-world charm with modern living. Despite the hot summers exceeding 100°F, our home theater solutions provide a refreshing retreat for residents. Whether you're restoring a historic home or upgrading a newer build, our team ensures your home theater complements the unique character of your property while delivering top-tier audiovisual performance.
serviceAreas.localContext: Georgetown's mix of historic and contemporary homes allows for versatile home theater integrations.

serviceAreas.content: Pflugerville, TX, with a population of around 73,000, is a rapidly developing city known for its affordable newer construction homes. Horizon Home Theater is excited to serve this vibrant community, where homeowners seek modern entertainment solutions. The hot summers, often exceeding 100°F, make indoor entertainment spaces highly desirable. Our team specializes in designing and installing home theaters that fit seamlessly into Pflugerville's newer homes, offering everything from compact media rooms to expansive theater setups with the latest technology.
serviceAreas.localContext: Pflugerville's newer homes provide a blank canvas for custom home theater installations.

serviceAreas.content: Horizon Home Theater is proud to serve Leander, TX, a fast-growing suburb with a population of approximately 60,000. Our team works closely with homeowners to create customized theaters that cater to their lifestyle, whether it's a sleek minimalist design or a fully immersive cinematic experience.
serviceAreas.localContext: Leander's expanding suburban landscape offers great opportunities for home theater projects.
